title: Speech: ASR (Whisper) + TTS + streaming
focus: Encoder-decoder vs CTC; Tacotron / FastSpeech; streaming latency.

items.label: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
interviewQuestions: Walk through BFS with queue. How do you cleanly separate one level from the next?
Can you do this DFS-recursively while still grouping by level?

items.label: ASR: from HMMs to Whisper
interviewQuestions: Walk through Whisper's encoder-decoder design and weakly-supervised training data.
Compare CTC vs attention-based seq2seq for ASR.

items.label: TTS: Tacotron, FastSpeech, neural vocoders
interviewQuestions: Compare two-stage (text → mel → wav) vs end-to-end TTS.
Why does prosody / expressive control remain hard in TTS, and how do modern systems handle it?

items.label: Streaming ASR: latency vs accuracy
interviewQuestions: What's the trade-off between latency and accuracy in streaming ASR?
How would you design a chunked / look-ahead streaming ASR to keep latency under 300ms?
